Container.Name: StockAnalyzer
Container.Overview: AI-assisted stock portfolio analyser. Reads holdings from Trading 212, fetches live market data, and uses Claude to generate Buy/Hold/Sell recommendations with price targets, sentiment, catalysts and 90-day outlook. Runs on a schedule (Mon/Wed/Sat by default) and stores history in SQLite.
Container.Requires: Claude subscription (Pro or Max). Run 'claude login' on the Unraid host before starting the container. Trading 212 account optional. Docker login to ghcr.io required — run: docker login ghcr.io -u tayoos

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port the dashboard is served on. Access via http://[UnraidIP]:8765

Config.Name: Database directory
Config.Description: Where the SQLite database is stored. Put this on your fast ZFS/cache pool for best performance.

Config.Name: Reports directory
Config.Description: Where generated Excel/text analysis reports are saved.

Config.Name: Stocks input directory
Config.Description: Optional: place a stocks.xlsx here to manually define holdings as a fallback when T212 sync is not used.

Config.Name: Backup destination
Config.Description: Where nightly backups are written. Point this at your MAIN Unraid array (not the cache pool) for parity protection. Mounting this volume enables backups automatically — leave the host path blank or remove this entry to disable backups entirely.

Config.Name: Claude credentials
Config.Description: Persistent folder for Claude login credentials. After first start, run: docker exec -it stock-analyzer claude login — then follow the browser link. Uses your Claude subscription, no API key needed.

Config.Name: Trading 212 API Key
Config.Description: T212 API Key ID. In T212: Settings → API → Create key. Read-only scope is sufficient.

Config.Name: Trading 212 API Secret
Config.Description: T212 API Secret Key. Shown once when you generate the key — save it somewhere safe.

Config.Name: Dashboard Username
Config.Description: Username for Basic Auth login when accessing the dashboard directly (not via a reverse proxy).

Config.Name: Dashboard Password
Config.Description: Password for Basic Auth. Use a strong password — this protects your financial data.

Config.Name: Trusted Networks (proxy bypass)
Config.Description: Comma-separated CIDRs that bypass Basic Auth (e.g. your Authelia/nginx proxy IP or LAN subnet). Requests from these IPs are trusted without a password. Example: 192.168.1.0/24,172.17.0.0/16

Config.Name: Report Encryption Key
Config.Description: Optional. If set, Excel reports are password-protected and text reports are encrypted. Use a value DIFFERENT from your dashboard password.

Config.Name: Reports Retention Days
Config.Description: Reports older than this many days are deleted automatically on each analysis run.

Config.Name: Analysis Schedule Days
Config.Description: Comma-separated day numbers to run analysis (0=Mon, 1=Tue, 2=Wed, 3=Thu, 4=Fri, 5=Sat, 6=Sun). Default: 0,2,5 = Mon/Wed/Sat.

Config.Name: Analysis Schedule Hour (UTC)
Config.Description: Hour (UTC) at which the scheduled analysis runs. Default: 7 = 07:00 UTC.

Config.Name: Backup Retention Days
Config.Description: Backups older than this many days are removed automatically.

Config.Name: Port (internal)
Config.Description: Internal port the Flask server listens on. Only change this if you also change the Web UI Port above.

Config.Name: Cost Method
Config.Description: Cost basis calculation method: AVCO (average cost, default) or FIFO.
